ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student is expected to graduate */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the student belongs to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the student was admitted to the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the module belongs to */,
  "prerequisite_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite module */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor responsible for the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_prerequisite_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "prerequisite_activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor responsible for the activity */,
  "expected_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the activity in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_prerequisite_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to evaluate student responses */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being evaluated */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being evaluated */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score given to the student for the evaluation */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who conducted the evaluation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the student in their answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_scraper_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web scraper order */,
  "web_scraper_start_url" TEXT /* Start URL for the web scraper */,
  "web_scraper_order" TEXT /* Text of the web scraper order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the web scraper order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the web scraper order was created */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the web scraper order was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_reflections" (
  "reflection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reflection */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who wrote the reflection */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being reflected on */,
  "reflection_text" TEXT /* Text of the reflection */,
  "reflection_date" TEXT /* Date of the reflection */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the student in their reflection */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor on the reflection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reflection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_reflections_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_reflections_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being evaluated */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Score given to the student for the evaluation */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who conducted the evaluation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the student in their skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_evaluations_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
